query: What is the relationship between BMS maps and COBOL programs?

results.name: COCRDLI
results.content:
COCRDLI DFHMSD LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: COTRTLI
results.content:
COTRTLI DFHMSD LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: COCRDSL
results.content:
COCRDSL DFHMSD LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: COBIL00
results.content:
COBIL00 DFHMSD CTRL=(ALARM,FREEKB),                                    -
               EXTATT=YES,                                             -
               LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM
